ha2e26b18gc64bg4c70ga652gdd570988f494: I'd like to see your wares.
hfac6105bgf872g4410gb8bag16d50ebb014c: Always happy to help those who follow the First Circle.
hd033edd1ga3dag484egb109g5f828d429d33: Of course. But please remember: you're not the only one in need.
h614d12afg2670g4851gb68cg0280fd9c40b6: Refugees, adventurers, and even a drow! No one in years and suddenly we're overwhelmed.
hd2a19ecbg9d83g41a0gaef7g9b8ccb540f36: Refugees, adventurers, and now a far-out visitor! No one in years and suddenly we're overwhelmed.
ha34b3528g1e75g4dcegb5a3ge8edfc574438: Refugees, adventurers, and even a duergar! No one in years and suddenly we're overwhelmed.
h8964f820gc407g4b0fg9f36g035ede299bfd: Refugees, adventurers - no one in years and suddenly we're overwhelmed.
haf9cb6adgd5c3g4433g9a16ge8332c9c2a3d: Well met, and thank you for beating back those goblins. Most brave of you.
h1b2914e9g87b6g4ff6ga121gf14d398811e0: Is there anything you need? I lower my prices for fellow druids.
hed71e8dfg165dg4fcbga4e7geb72ea8d7150: But you'll need to be quick - the ritual will be complete before too long.
h419524e3g38c6g4df3gbe85g06550579154e: Is there anything you need? Act fast if you do - the ritual will be complete before too long.
h2a0d86abgb0a3g49b1g9dccgc94d1def9e66: What ritual are you talking about?
ha7faa0c1g872ag44b7gb9d2g8e9fc7c3055d: Ah - I forgot you're a blow-in. A few days hence, this grove will be completely concealed by thorny vines.
h038e7bedg38c2g4be1g908egb5ee2b0eae55: None will be able to enter - or leave.
hc8863b8bga4c5g4c5cg9e26ge0a6d8d9f49f: A drastic measure. But more monsters seem to terrorise this region every day.
h4781a3d6g0a05g4354g94f5g8af05b730e25: We druids will be safe. As for those that took refuge here... well, may Silvanus guard them as they continue their travels.
hab07ec82g91beg47c7gb77fg9ac17c995ba1: You just said the region's overrun by monsters. They won't survive by themselves.
h935c05bbg626bg445bg8bb1gcd671d116eb6: As I said, it's a drastic measure. But the survival of the grove is paramount.
h12abe64cg0802g4300gb16fgeb8fc6aa0cce: There just aren't enough supplies to support everyone.
ha5e327afg8762g4190gb619g360a733cb852: Dire times. High stakes. I understand.
hc69234b3g539cg4b27ga718gf0389c78a190: You sound just like Kagha. Oh, that it had to come to this...
h0ade0e44gb22dg4db2g8041g410bbefc0637: I pray to Silvanus each night - the Wild Father will protect those refugees. I hope.
hd2c2abecgef02g48d5g8efdg643810730cf7: Seems like most are tieflings. They'll be fine. They have devilish powers.
h3bda8f59g3277g4509gba4ag4ea22107fde4: Ignorance is agony, my friend. I will include you in my prayers. I'd better get started - for your sake.
hfdb6cc30gd6aeg4ad8gb652g75f8dbfe50c8: I don't want this to happen either, but Kagha makes the decisions.
hd018d965g5bcag4f90ga690gfd6254943312: I can do nothing but pray to Silvanus in the hopes that He'll protect them.
hd722888fgd93cg4677gb927g2d9fce74c91f: Your prayers won't save them. But your voice might sway Kagha.
h91aa7d6dg53ddg463bga642g31401b126abc: You don't know Kagha. She won't listen. I'm truly sorry.
h0fab5e36g9722g4374gb307g6b8d0dc4178d: Are you really locking down the grove?
h2f549610g81bdg42cagb3e8g3f4a04193e65: I know it's drastic, but more monsters seem to terrorise this region every day.
he2aa7323ged6cg4212g9b6fg2027b4bc8b77: I pray no goblin arrow has grazed you!
hdbc44c30g35bcg493egaec2g5b8fda933e48: Nettie could put you to rights. She should be with the others in the inner chambers, but I doubt she'll be taking on new patients. The grove will be locked down soon.
h20a11af3g7a09g4b68g81c6ga5843e599331: So you're really locking down the grove?
h39eaaabfgc4fag4817g9a19gf80b75792a18: Nettie's your best bet, with Master Halsin gone. She should be with the others in the inner chambers.
hb3f2dd91gb70eg41efg8be4g40c5a0b3644f: Just some bits and bobs I no longer need.
